rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the bare `simp` inside `fiberHomeomorph` is doing real, goal-closing work while depending on the default simp set, and proposes a grounded `simp only` (or direct `Iff.intro`) replacement that improves robustness; I confirmed the bare `simp` at Deck.lean:73 against the diff. Review 2's approve misses this minor but real proof-quality nit, so acting on Review 1 yields a marginally more maintainable PR, though the edit is small and bare terminal simp is defensible.
